reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer un alto y tomar o comer algo sabroso para continuar con el viaje. Mucha gente todo el tiempo, sobre todo en épocas de vacacionesya que es el paso obligado para quienes van o regresan de su merecido descanso. Baños limpios y completos. Buena atención del personal

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop for a bite to eat or a drink before continuing your journey. It's always busy, especially during holiday periods, as it's a popular stop for those going to or returning from their well-deserved break. The restrooms are clean and well-equipped. The staff is very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtc2RicWNREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para descansar y seguir viaje ,muy buena atención y limpieza.
Las habitaciones tienen todo lo necesario.
El personal muy amable .
Mejoraría las medialunas del desayuno.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to rest and continue your journey, very good service and cleanliness.
The rooms have everything you need.
The staff is very friendly. The breakfast croissants could be improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBZ09tZU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Se han ido modernizando pero hay ciertas incomodidades que son llamativas sobre todo debido al valor del hospedaje
En la habitación faltaba una mesita
En el baño resulta incómodo mampara y cortina,
Mejoraron el estacionamiento y el parque

(Translated by Google)
They've been modernizing, but there are some noticeable inconveniences, especially considering the price of the accommodation.
The room was missing a small table.
The shower screen and curtain in the bathroom are inconvenient.
The parking and the park have improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdjlQb0dnEAE
